testcase.name: KASIRSOLO FnB - Restaurant POS Flow › FnB-01: Should load FnB app successfully
KASIRSOLO FnB - Restaurant POS Flow › FnB-02: Should display product catalog
KASIRSOLO FnB - Restaurant POS Flow › FnB-03: Should add single item to cart
KASIRSOLO FnB - Restaurant POS Flow › FnB-04: Should add multiple items to cart
KASIRSOLO FnB - Restaurant POS Flow › FnB-05: Should open cart and view items
KASIRSOLO FnB - Restaurant POS Flow › FnB-06: Should update item quantity
KASIRSOLO FnB - Restaurant POS Flow › FnB-07: Should proceed to checkout
KASIRSOLO FnB - Restaurant POS Flow › FnB-08: Should handle empty cart removal
KASIRSOLO FnB - Restaurant POS Flow › FnB-09: Should validate price display
KASIRSOLO FnB - Restaurant POS Flow › FnB-10: Should support keyboard navigation
KASIRSOLO Retail - Store POS Flow › Retail-01: Should load Retail app successfully
KASIRSOLO Retail - Store POS Flow › Retail-02: Should display product list

KASIRSOLO Retail - Store POS Flow › Retail-11: Should support discount/promo input
KASIRSOLO Retail - Store POS Flow › Retail-12: Should support search functionality
